changeSet.author: openelisglobal

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.reference_tables WHERE LOWER(TRIM(name)) = 'validation_qc_acknowledgment'

changeSet.comment: Register validation_qc_acknowledgment for the generic history audit trail (OGC-554 FR-04)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.reference_tables (id, name, keep_history, is_hl7_encoded, lastupdated) VALUES ( (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM clinlims.reference_tables), 'VALIDATION_QC_ACKNOWLEDGMENT', 'Y', 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
